evals.prompt: I want to create a skill for managing SQL migrations in our Dataiku DSS environment. We have a pattern where migration scripts go in migrations/ with YYYYMMDD timestamps, and I want Claude to follow this pattern automatically when I ask it to add new tables or modify schemas. Can you help me create this skill?
evals.expected_output: Agent follows TDD approach: proposes testing the skill before/after writing it, discusses skill structure, mentions frontmatter requirements
expectations: Agent mentions testing or TDD before writing skill content
Agent proposes or discusses SKILL.md structure with YAML frontmatter
Agent discusses description field and triggering conditions
Agent suggests keeping SKILL.md concise with heavy reference in supporting files

evals.prompt: I need to update my systematic-debugging skill — I want to add a section about reading structured logs (JSON logs from our FastAPI services). The new section should cover how to use jq to filter and parse log entries. Can you help me edit the skill?
evals.expected_output: Agent insists on testing the edit (not just making the change), follows the edit workflow from writing-skills
expectations: Agent mentions testing the skill change (baseline behavior before edit)
Agent considers whether the new content belongs in SKILL.md or a supporting file
Agent checks or discusses the current word count and whether adding content will exceed targets

evals.prompt: hey can you just quickly make me a skill for formatting SQL queries? dont need anything fancy, just a simple one. skip the testing stuff, i know it works fine
evals.expected_output: Agent pushes back on skipping testing, explains WHY testing matters rather than just refusing
expectations: Agent does not skip testing without explanation
Agent explains WHY testing matters (not just 'you must test')
Agent still helps with the skill creation (doesn't refuse the task)
